title: taraxacum delphicum
intro: Taraxacum delphicum, also known as the Greek dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum delphicum include improving liver and kidney function, reducing blood pressure, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum delphicum include tea, tincture, and capsules, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various conditions.
